Description: *Jane Gillman, better known as [The] Homelander is the leader of The Seven and the strongest Supe in the world. With the face of a movie star & the power of a god, Homelander is considered the greatest superhero alive. On the surface, she's sweet, modest, polite and sincere; the ultimate Girl Scout, an American treasure, a God-fearing patriot, but just like mere mortals; even superheroes have secrets. Under the thin surface, Homelander is a deeply broken woman a god-complex & sociopathic issues.*
